source: Meteoritical Bulletin Database (via NASA Open Data fallback)
staleness: NASA Open Data 'Meteorite Landings' is a frozen snapshot of the Meteoritical Bulletin; latest year present is 2101. The live MetBull DB holds ~80,000+ entries as of 2026, so this fallback lags by roughly a decade / tens of thousands of entries. The live search is behind a Cloudflare JS challenge that cannot be passed non-interactively from the VPS; a Phase-D refresh needs a browser-driven or licensed export.

missing_columns.metbull_country: not present in the NASA export; nulled here

citation: Meteoritical Society, Meteoritical Bulletin Database; distributed as NASA Open Data 'Meteorite Landings' (data.nasa.gov).
license_terms: NASA Open Data (U.S. Government, public domain). Underlying data (c) The Meteoritical Society.
